_comment: v11: corpus expansion via smol-smoltalk subsample. Same v9/v10 architecture (proven). EPOCHS dropped to 4 to fit ~17 MB combined corpus in 5h L4 budget. NGRAM_TABLE_SIZE bumped to 100003 because combined vocab will exceed 9509 (estimated 12-15k after rare-merge across 3 corpora). Stage this config but do not upload until v10 fails — if v10 cracks coherence we ship v10 instead.
